pages.label: Home
pages.title: UCAISM.org | Individual Sovereignty in the Age of AI
pages.description: UCAISM Global Initiative is a research and public-education platform founded by Chang-Gyu Kwag, exploring individual sovereignty, AI governance, and intelligent capitalism.

pages.title: Research Library | UCAISM.org

pages.title: Foundation Papers | UCAISM.org
pages.description: Foundational research papers defining UCAISM, the Sovereignty Gap, fiduciary AI, open digital rails, and Intelligent Capitalism.

pages.title: Policy Briefs | UCAISM.org
